title: 红显调谐RedstoneTuning
description: This project can add directional indicators to all Redstone-related blocks via a self-illuminating method, with the effect working properly both during the day and at night.
body:
Based on the update of version 24w33a, self-illumination textures can be applied to games more easily. Therefore, this is a resource pack centered around "self-illumination textures" that makes Minecraft clearer and more visible. It includes changes to various aspects such as the display effect of redstone, optimization, and GUI. For details, see the version changes.

基于24w33a版本的更新，使得自发光可以更加简单地应用到游戏中，所以这是一款围绕着“自发光纹理”，让我的世界变得更为清晰可见的资源包。其中包含对红石的显示效果、优化、GUI等多种层面的改动，详情见版本改动。
